greengrassv2.componentversion.componentd.Description: The type of this dependency. Choose from the following options:  + `SOFT` – The component doesn't restart if the dependency changes state.+ `HARD` – The component restarts if the dependency changes state.Default: `HARD`
The component version requirement for the component dependency.  AWS IoT Greengrass uses semantic version constraints. For more information, see [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).
